shelterSnapshot.primaryNeed: Food, veterinary care, medicine, shelter supplies, and adoption support

weeklyMessage: Terra Vita is a temporary care center for homeless dogs and cats in Samarkand. The center depends on donations, volunteers, and community support to feed, treat, shelter, and place animals into homes.
urgentNeeds: Monthly food support for dogs and cats
Cleaning supplies, bedding, transport, and repair materials
Adoption outreach and responsible ownership education

featuredAnimals.name: Chelsea
featuredAnimals.story: Chelsea is listed on Terra Vita's dog adoption page. Visitors can follow the official shelter link for the latest adoption details.

featuredAnimals.name: Mika
featuredAnimals.story: Mika is listed on Terra Vita's cat adoption page. Visitors can follow the official shelter link for the latest adoption details.

featuredAnimals.name: Raksha
featuredAnimals.story: Terra Vita's blog includes Raksha's story, a reminder that many shelter animals need long-term care, advocacy, and patient adoption support.

updates.title: Vatandosh launches Terra Vita support page
updates.text: This page is designed for U.S. neighborhood sharing and will direct supporters to Terra Vita's official channels while explaining the wider animal welfare need in Uzbekistan.

updates.title: What we are tracking
updates.text: Weekly updates will focus on current shelter needs, featured animals, adoption stories, volunteer requests, and verified donation pathways.
